title: Testimonial Carousel

statement.markdown:
Create a responsive testimonial carousel component using HTML and CSS.
markup
## Testimonial Carousel
Create a responsive testimonial carousel with the following features:
### Requirements
1. The carousel should have a dynamic number of slides based on the testimonials provided.
2. The carousel should have navigation buttons to move to the previous and next slides.
3. The carousel should have a pause-on-hover feature. When the user hovers over the carousel, the slides should stop moving.
4. The carousel should be responsive and work on different screen sizes.

constraints: Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
Implement a dynamic number of slides based on the testimonials provided.
Implement navigation buttons to move to the previous and next slides.
